A

addGoal(GreenGoal) - Method in class model.VillageModelManager
Adds a goal to the Village
addGreenActivity() - Method in class view.Controller
 
addGreenActivity(GreenActivity) - Method in class model.Village
Add a greenActivity to CatalogueOfIdeas It also checks if the addedGreen activity is not in the catalogueOfIdeas The points of the activity are added to the GreenGoal
addGreenActivity(GreenActivity) - Method in class model.VillageModelManager
Add a GreenActivity to the ArrayList of GreenActivities
addGreenGoal() - Method in class view.Controller
 
addGreenGoal(GreenGoal) - Method in class model.Village
Add a greenGoal to the goals It also checks if the added goal is in the goals to make sure for no copies
addPerformer() - Method in class view.Controller
 
addPerformer(Villager) - Method in class model.SharedTask
Adds a villager who will perform the shared task.
addPoints(int) - Method in class model.Villager
adds points to the curent amount of point of the selected villager
addResetDay(int) - Method in class model.VillageModelManager
Adds a period of time in days when all the vilagers personal points will be reseted
addResetPeriod(int) - Method in class model.Village
sets period to the period field (int) and also stores the day of the calling (using Date.today()) to the setdate field (Date)
addSharedTask() - Method in class view.Controller
 
addSharedTask(SharedTask) - Method in class model.Village
Adds or updates a SharedTask in the list.
addSharedTask(SharedTask) - Method in class model.VillageModelManager
Adds a shared task to the arraylist of shared tasks
addTadeOffer() - Method in class view.Controller
 
addTrade(TradeOffer) - Method in class model.VillageModelManager
Adds a trade to the arraylist of trades present in the village
addTradeOffer(TradeOffer) - Method in class model.Village
 
addVillager() - Method in class view.Controller
 
addVillager(Villager) - Method in class model.Village
adds villager to village
addVillager(Villager) - Method in class model.VillageModelManager
Adds a villager to the Village
